nodes.label: P2.2 — the objective: class-aware (hard) negatives
nodes.rationale: Tests whether a class-aware negative partner bends the depth-slope, holding P2.1's healthy transmission cell fixed. Grid: random vs hard-oracle vs hard-proto vs hard-unsup.

nodes.label: P2.2's negative-partner grid
nodes.rationale: random slope -0.020; hard-oracle -0.022; hard-proto -0.015; hard-unsup -0.022. KMeans cluster purity only 0.226 on CIFAR. Synth control: oracle DOES lift there (+0.027, real).

nodes.label: P2.2 verdict: DEPTH IS NOT THE LEVER (decisive negative)
nodes.rationale: Even a perfect label-oracle negative fails to bend the depth-slope on CIFAR (-0.022, identical to random); the synth control confirms the mechanism works where classes exist, so the CIFAR negative is real.
